zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Briwere於大約1184年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特時，她的父親William de Briwere II40歲，母親Beatrice de Vaux36歲。她於大約1200年與William Paynell of Bampton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1246年之前在英國哈普爾桑多。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Briwere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Pierre, Adrien, Aurele, Benedicte, Benoit, Colette, Fernand, Gaston, Marcel, Micheline.

French (Brière): topographic name from a regional variant of Old French bruiere ‘heather’ (see Bruyere ), or a habitational name from La Brière, the name of several places mainly in the northern part of France, from the same word.
History: Jean Brière from Clarbec in Calvados, France, married Jeanne Grandin in Quebec City, QC, in 1671.

variants.name: Bruyere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Fernand, Jacques, Marcel.

French (Bruyère): from Old French bruiere ‘heather’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived in a place where heather grew, or a habitational name from one of the places in France (for example in Calvados) named with this word. Compare Labruyere .
Altered form (Bruyère) of French Bruguier: habitational name from (Le) Bruguier, the name of several places in the southeastern part of France, a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Briwere was born about 1184, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Briwere II, was 40 and her mother, Beatrice de Vaux, was 36. She married William Paynell of Bampton about 1200. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died before 1246, in Sandown, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Briwere est née environ 1184, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Briwere II, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Vaux, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé William Paynell of Bampton environ 1200. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1246, à Sandown, Hampshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Briwereが約1184年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父William de Briwere IIは40歳，母Beatrice de Vauxは36歳であった。約1200年にWilliam Paynell of Bamptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1246年以前にイギリスハンプシュアイアサンダウンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Briwere(이)가 대략 1184년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Briwere II(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice de Vaux(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1200년 William Paynell of Bampton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1246년 이전 영국 함프실르 샌다운에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Briwere родилась около 1184 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Briwere II было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Vaux, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Paynell of Bampton около 1200 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 1246 г. в местности сэндоун, хампшир, Англия.
